column3: Benefit 1 ($10): What is the smallest total amount of money I could offer that would get you to wait one year for payment?
column4: Benefit 2 ($1,000): What is the smallest total amount of money I could offer that would get you to wait one year for payment?
column5: Benefit 3 ($1 million): What is the smallest total amount of money I could offer that would get you to wait one year for payment?
column6: Cost 1 ($1 million): What is the most you are willing to pay out of pocket right now to delay that bill from one to two years?
column7: Cost 2 ($1 million): What is the most you are willing to pay out of pocket right now to delay that bill from ten to eleven years?
column8: Cost 3 ($1 million): What is the most you are willing to pay out of pocket right now to delay that bill from fifty to fifty-one years?
